fix_summary: Localized knowledge search change in `backend/app/services/knowledge_service.py` switches from prefix-only to substring/contains matching across topic, title, and content. Added focused regression coverage for mid-field, prefix, and no-match behavior. Automated tests passed.
approval_reasons: The code change is narrowly scoped to the backend knowledge search service and preserves the existing API contract.
The new query uses `ilike('%query%')`, which satisfies substring matching while still allowing prefix matches as a subset.
Regression tests cover the target behavior and confirm no-match handling.
